creator: herbert@gojira.at
text:
Created attachment 250636
Update to 1.11.2

The attached patch updates www/tinyproxy to version 1.11.2. From the release notes:

Fixes issues detected in 1.11.1, including a nasty UAF bug.
I guess this should be added to vuln.xml. For details see: https://nvd.nist.gov/vuln/detail/CVE-2023-49606
